Video.summary: Today at My Froggy Stuff we've got another One of a kind Custom Doll!! This time Froggy creates her favorite YouTuber TraciJHines in this Fabsome One of a Kind Celebrity Custom Doll! From custom Ombre Hair (without rerooting!!) to a DIY Graphic Tee we've checked ALL the boxes!!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make TraciJHines - YouTuber Custom Doll - Ombre Hair - Graphic Tee

Video.summary: The lumber rack is the unsung hero of the woodworking shop. Its responsible for holding our raw materials safely, securely, and in an organized fashion until we're ready to use them.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Lumber Rack aka Racking My Brain

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Lumber Rack aka Racking My Brain
The Wood Whisperer: Lumber Rack aka Racking My Brain

Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 7 - Shrinking Violet

Video.summary: This Coffee Filter Bouquet is a gorgeous paper flower tutorial for your big day. Make a DIY bridal bouquet out of coffee filters with this free crafting video. Combining dyed coffee filters and die cutting techniques, this forever flower bouquet is a charming and secretly cheap way to make a wedding bouquet. Consider making this homemade bouquet idea for a wedding, baby shower, or for spring accents in your home. You never have to worry about it wilting!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Coffee Filter Bouquet

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Coffee Filter Bouquet
FaveCrafts: Coffee Filter Bouquet

Video.summary: Learn how to make a ribbons wreath.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Ribbons DIY Wreath

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Ribbons DIY Wreath

Video.title: FaveCrafts: Rainbow Perler Bead Pattern

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Rainbow Perler Bead Pattern
FaveCrafts: Rainbow Perler Bead Pattern

Video.summary: While picking out the perfect gift for dad can be tempting, sometimes a gift card is an even better idea. As they say, it is the thought that counts! With this Toolbox Fathers Day Craft, you can learn how to make the perfect gift for dad. By creating a DIY craft to keep the gift card tucked into, you give your dad some handmade love and something useful at the same time. Plus, you could easily use this homemade box to wrap up some homemade candies, as well.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft
FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft
